Home›Services› SOAR & Workflow Automation
Security Orchestration & Automation

SOAR Implementation &
Cybersecurity Workflow Automation

We design, build, and deploy automated incident response workflows that eliminate analyst toil, reduce mean time to respond, and scale your security operations without scaling headcount.

Automate the Work Your Analysts Shouldn't Be Doing Manually

The average SOC analyst spends more than 40% of their time on repetitive, low-judgment tasks — alert triage, indicator enrichment, ticket creation, containment actions. SOAR eliminates that burden by automating defined workflows end-to-end, freeing analysts to focus on investigation, threat hunting, and high-confidence decision-making where human judgment matters most.

We implement SOAR platforms and build custom automated workflows tailored to your specific environment, threat profile, and existing tool stack — not generic playbooks copied from vendor documentation.

What SOAR Actually Does

SOAR (Security Orchestration, Automation, and Response) integrates your security tools into a unified workflow engine that can:

  • Orchestrate — Connect SIEM, EDR, threat intel feeds, ticketing, identity, and network tools into coordinated workflows
  • Automate — Execute repeatable decision trees without analyst intervention, at machine speed
  • Respond — Take containment actions automatically (block IP, isolate endpoint, disable account, quarantine email) based on confirmed conditions
  • Measure — Track MTTR, automation rates, playbook performance, and analyst time savings with built-in metrics

Our SOAR Implementation Approach

We scope every SOAR engagement around your highest-volume, highest-cost alert types — typically phishing, endpoint alerts, identity anomalies, and network detections — and build automation that delivers measurable ROI within 90 days.

  • Current-state alert volume and triage time baseline assessment
  • Platform selection and architecture design (cloud-native vs. on-premise vs. hybrid)
  • Integration layer design — API connections, webhook handlers, and bidirectional data flows
  • Playbook design workshops: define trigger conditions, decision logic, automated actions, and human escalation gates
  • Playbook development, testing, and parallel-run validation
  • Analyst training, runbook documentation, and handoff
  • Post-deployment tuning, performance measurement, and playbook expansion

Automated Workflow Examples

Below are representative SOAR workflows we build and deploy. Each is customized to your environment, tool stack, and escalation thresholds.

Platforms

  • Splunk SOAR (Phantom)
  • Palo Alto XSOAR
  • Microsoft Sentinel Playbooks
  • IBM QRadar SOAR
  • ServiceNow SecOps
  • Tines (No-Code SOAR)
  • Swimlane

Integrated Tools

  • CrowdStrike / SentinelOne
  • Microsoft Defender / Purview
  • Okta / Entra ID
  • Proofpoint / Mimecast
  • VirusTotal / Shodan
  • Jira / ServiceNow
  • Slack / Teams / PagerDuty

Typical Outcomes

  • 60–80% reduction in manual triage time
  • MTTR reduced from hours to minutes
  • 90%+ of Tier 1 alerts auto-resolved
  • Full audit trail for compliance

Start a SOAR Engagement

We scope SOAR projects around your highest-volume alert types and deliver measurable ROI within 90 days.

Schedule Consultation 301-352-4855
Phishing Response

Automated Phishing Triage & Remediation

Fully automated response from user-reported phishing email through remediation — no analyst required for the majority of cases.

  • User reports email via button or forward alias
  • Extract headers, URLs, attachments, sender metadata
  • Enrich indicators against VirusTotal, URLhaus, WHOIS, threat intel
  • Score threat level: benign / suspicious / malicious
  • Auto-delete confirmed malicious emails from all mailboxes
  • Block sender domain and URLs in email gateway
  • Create SIEM event and Jira/ServiceNow ticket with full evidence package
  • Notify reporter with outcome; escalate to analyst if inconclusive
Endpoint Compromise

Endpoint Alert Triage & Automated Containment

Bridges EDR alert to analyst investigation — automating enrichment and containment decisions based on confidence scoring.

  • EDR alert fires (malware detection, suspicious process, lateral movement)
  • Query SIEM for correlated events on same host in prior 24 hours
  • Pull host context: asset owner, criticality tier, patch level, last login
  • Enrich file hashes and process names against threat intel
  • High confidence: auto-isolate endpoint via EDR API
  • Disable associated user account in Active Directory / Entra ID
  • Create P1 incident ticket with full context and timeline
  • Page on-call analyst via PagerDuty with pre-populated investigation notes
Identity & Access

Impossible Travel & Account Compromise Response

Automated response to identity anomalies — from impossible travel detection through MFA challenge, session revocation, and analyst notification.

  • SIEM or IdP detects impossible travel or simultaneous geo-login
  • Pull user profile: role, department, recent travel history, risk score
  • Query last 48h authentication logs for additional anomalies
  • Low risk: trigger step-up MFA challenge to user
  • High risk: revoke all active sessions via Okta / Entra API
  • Force password reset at next login
  • Notify manager and IT security via Teams / Slack
  • Create incident record with full authentication timeline
Threat Intelligence

Automated IOC Enrichment & Blocking

Ingests threat intel feeds and automatically enriches, validates, and operationalizes indicators across your defensive stack.

  • New IOC ingested from threat intel feed (ISAC, commercial, government)
  • Deduplicate and validate against existing IOC library
  • Enrich: passive DNS, WHOIS, geo, malware family, campaign attribution
  • Score confidence and determine blocking threshold
  • Auto-push high-confidence IOCs to firewall, proxy, EDR block lists
  • Create SIEM watchlist entries for historical and prospective correlation
  • Search historical logs for prior hits — auto-create incidents if found
  • Generate intel report and distribute to stakeholders
Vulnerability Management

Scan-to-Ticket Automated Vulnerability Workflow

Closes the loop between vulnerability scanner output and remediation tracking — without manual analyst processing of scan reports.

  • Tenable / Qualys scan completes; results ingested via API
  • Deduplicate findings against open vulnerability tickets
  • Enrich CVEs: CVSS score, EPSS exploit probability, KEV status
  • Map to asset owner via CMDB lookup
  • Auto-create Jira tickets with SLA based on severity and asset criticality
  • Assign to responsible team; notify via Slack / email
  • Track SLA compliance; escalate overdue items to management
  • Auto-close tickets when re-scan confirms remediation
Ransomware Response

Automated Ransomware Containment Playbook

Time-critical automated response designed to contain ransomware spread within the first 60 seconds of detection.

  • EDR detects ransomware indicators (mass file encryption, shadow copy deletion)
  • Immediately isolate affected host from network via EDR API
  • Block associated process hashes sitewide across all endpoints
  • Query SIEM for lateral movement indicators in prior 4 hours
  • Identify potentially affected hosts — stage for investigation
  • Disable compromised user credentials across AD and cloud IdP
  • Trigger executive notification workflow with incident status page
  • Initiate DFIR case with full forensic preservation instructions

SOAR Platform Expertise

We are platform-agnostic and select the right SOAR solution based on your existing tool ecosystem, team size, budget, and operational requirements — not vendor relationships.
